title: GitHub - sand0vvv/fleet: A fleet of AI coding agents in your Telegram supergroup. Self-hosted, local, no account.
excerpt: A fleet of AI coding agents in your Telegram supergroup. Self-hosted, local, no account. - sand0vvv/fleet
content_html:
A fleet of AI coding agents in your Telegram supergroup.
Self-hosted · local · no account.

Fleet lets you drive a whole team of AI coding agents — Claude Code and Codex — from your phone, in a single Telegram supergroup. Each agent gets its own topic in the group. You text (or voice-message) them, they work on your machine and text back: code, files, screenshots, questions, progress.

Everything runs locally. No cloud service, no sign-up, no dashboard. Your Telegram bot token and API keys stay on your machine in ~/.fleet/config.json. Telegram is reached via long-polling — no public URL, no webhook, works behind any NAT.

Built in public and still early — expect rough edges. Issues and PRs welcome.

Quickstart

0. Prerequisites — Node.js ≥ 18 and Claude Code installed and logged in (claude in your PATH). Codex is optional.

1. Make a bot — talk to @BotFather in Telegram: /newbot, pick a name, copy the token.

2. Make the group — create a Telegram group, enable Topics (group settings → Topics), and add your bot as admin (it needs to manage topics).

3. Install & configure:

npm i -g @sand0vvv/fleet
fleet init          # asks for the bot token, voice provider, defaults
fleet doctor        # green lights = ready
fleet start         # the runner — keep this terminal open

4. Link — send /link in your supergroup. The runner binds itself to you (your Telegram user id) and that group. From then on only you can command the fleet.

5. Spawn an agent — in the group's General topic:

/spawn C:\path\to\your\project

A topic appears named after the folder, a terminal window opens on your machine, and the agent is live. Text the topic — the agent answers there. Or from a terminal on the machine: cd into any project and run fleet claude (or fleet codex).

What it looks like

Telegram supergroup
├─ General             ← fleet commands: /spawn /list /usage …
├─ 🟢 my-webapp        ← Claude Code agent, running
├─ 🟢 my-webapp-codex  ← Codex agent in the same folder
└─ 🟡 data-pipeline    ← parked (wakes on your next message)

Topic titles carry live status: 🟢 running · 🟡 parked · 🔴 stopped/crashed. While an agent works on your message, the topic shows typing….

Every agent runs on your machine. Claude agents live in a real terminal window you can watch and type into; close the window and the agent parks (frees resources) — it wakes automatically on your next message, with its session continued (--resume/--continue). Codex agents open their own console window and also resume their last session on wake. A fresh session only happens when you ask for one (/new).

Commands

Send these in Telegram (the bot's / menu shows them too):

Command Where What it does
/link anywhere in the group bind the fleet to you + this supergroup (first run)
/spawn <path> [codex] [model] General new agent for a folder (its own topic + window)
/list General all agents and their state
/usage anywhere real Claude limits panel (5h session / weekly) from your local login
/status <agent> General one agent's state, session, context size
/context topic the agent's real /context output, relayed to Telegram
/compact /clear topic native Claude commands, typed into the live terminal
/model topic model picker (buttons)
/hide / /show topic close the window (agent keeps running) / reopen it
/stop / /restart topic stop the process / kill + respawn
/new topic arm a fresh session (applied on next restart)
/sessions / /use <id> topic list this folder's sessions / resume a specific one
/rename <name> topic rename agent + topic
/kill topic remove the agent: process, topic, record
/help anywhere contextual: fleet commands in General, agent commands in a topic

Any other slash command you type in an agent's topic (e.g. /cost, /doctor, /review) is forwarded straight into the agent's terminal as a native command.

Voice: send a voice message in an agent's topic — it's transcribed (Groq / OpenAI / local Whisper, your choice in fleet init) and delivered as text.

Files: agents send files and screenshots back into their topic; anything you attach in the topic is downloaded into the agent's .inbox/ and handed to it.

The CLI

fleet init          set up bot token, whisper, defaults  (re-run safe; secrets shown masked)
fleet start         run the fleet (single instance — a stale runner is replaced automatically)
fleet stop          stop the running fleet
fleet update        stop → npm i -g latest → restart, in one command
fleet logs [n]      last n lines of the runner log
fleet autostart on|off   start the fleet at logon (Windows)
fleet claude        spawn a Claude agent for the current folder
fleet codex         spawn a Codex agent for the current folder
fleet doctor        check node/claude/codex/token/link
fleet status        show current config + version

Every command tells you when a newer version is on npm; the runner also drops a one-liner into your group.

How it works

Telegram  ⇄ long-poll ⇄  fleet runner (your machine)
                            ├─ localhost HTTP+WS (for the MCP below — nothing exposed)
                            ├─ Claude agents  → node-pty terminal + fleet MCP (send_message/send_file,
                            │                   channel injection for incoming messages)
                            └─ Codex agents   → own console window; codex-shell drives the official
                                                `codex app-server` JSON-RPC to inject your messages live
  1. The runner long-polls the Telegram Bot API — no inbound ports, no webhook, no public URL.
  2. A message in an agent's topic is routed to that agent's local process.
  3. Each agent has a small fleet MCP that dials the runner back on localhost to push replies and files up to Telegram; incoming messages are injected into the live session (Claude: channel notification; Codex: turn/start over the app-server protocol).
  4. The runner posts the agent's reply into the right topic.

Reliability, both directions. Messages to a parked/offline agent are queued on disk and delivered when it wakes — nothing is lost if you closed the window. Replies and files from agents survive network hiccups the same way (on-disk outbox, retried in order). Rapid consecutive messages are debounced into one delivery (configurable, 0 = instant). A crashed agent is auto-restarted (crash-loop guarded), and if the runner itself dies it posts a crash report into your group before going down.

State: everything lives in ~/.fleet/ — config.json (token, owner, group, defaults), state.json (agents/topics/sessions), delivery queues, logs. Secrets never touch a project directory, so they can't be committed by accident. Delete the folder to factory-reset. (Override the config path with the FLEET_CONFIG env var.)

Troubleshooting

  • fleet doctor first — it checks everything. fleet logs shows the runner's recent log.
  • Port busy: fleet start kills a stale runner and takes over by itself. If a non-fleet process holds the port, set "port" in ~/.fleet/config.json.
  • Bot doesn't react: make sure the bot is an admin of the group and Topics are enabled; then /link again.
  • No terminal window pops: run fleet start in a real console (not a background service); /show retries and tells you honestly if the window failed.
  • Windows: if git-bash is installed agents use it, otherwise plain cmd.exe — both work.

Repo layout

Branch What
standalone this version — local, npm, long-polling. The one to use.
legacy the original cloud architecture (FastAPI backend + Postgres + webhook)
legacy-docker legacy variant that jails agents in a Docker sandbox

Author

Built by @sand0vvv.

License

MIT

A fleet of AI coding agents in your Telegram supergroup.
Self-hosted · local · no account.

sentences.en: A fleet of AI coding agents in your Telegram supergroup.
sentences.zh: Telegram 超级群组中的一组人工智能编码代理。

sentences.en: Self-hosted · local · no account.
sentences.zh: 自托管·本地·无帐户。

blocks.html_en: Fleet lets you drive a whole team of AI coding agents — Claude Code and Codex — from your phone, in a single Telegram supergroup. Each agent gets its own topic in the group. You text (or voice-message) them, they work on your machine and text back: code, files, screenshots, questions, progress.

sentences.en: Fleet lets you drive a whole team of AI coding agents — Claude Code and Codex — from your phone, in a single Telegram supergroup.
sentences.zh: Fleet 可让您通过手机在单个 Telegram 超级组中驱动整个 AI 编码代理团队（Claude Code 和 Codex）。

sentences.en: Each agent gets its own topic in the group.
sentences.zh: 每个代理在组中都有自己的主题。

sentences.en: You text (or voice-message) them, they work on your machine and text back: code, files, screenshots, questions, progress.
sentences.zh: 您给他们发短信（或语音消息），他们在您的机器上工作并回复短信：代码、文件、屏幕截图、问题、进度。

blocks.html_en: Everything runs locally. No cloud service, no sign-up, no dashboard. Your Telegram bot token and API keys stay on your machine in ~/.fleet/config.json. Telegram is reached via long-polling — no public URL, no webhook, works behind any NAT.

sentences.en: Everything runs locally.
sentences.zh: 一切都在本地运行。

sentences.en: No cloud service, no sign-up, no dashboard.
sentences.zh: 没有云服务，没有注册，没有仪表板。

sentences.en: Your Telegram bot token and API keys stay on your machine in ~/.fleet/config.json.
sentences.zh: 您的 Telegram 机器人令牌和 API 密钥保留在您的计算机上的 ~/.fleet/config.json 中。

sentences.en: Telegram is reached via long-polling — no public URL, no webhook, works behind any NAT.
sentences.zh: Telegram 是通过长轮询到达的——没有公共 URL，没有 webhook，可以在任何 NAT 后面工作。

sentences.en: Text the topic — the agent answers there.

blocks.html_en: Topic titles carry live status: 🟢 running · 🟡 parked · 🔴 stopped/crashed. While an agent works on your message, the topic shows typing….

sentences.en: While an agent works on your message, the topic shows typing….

sentences.en: Claude agents live in a real terminal window you can watch and type into; close the window and the agent parks (frees resources) — it wakes automatically on your next message, with its session continued (--resume/--continue).

sentences.zh: Codex 代理会打开自己的控制台窗口，并在唤醒时恢复上次会话。

sentences.en: Any other slash command you type in an agent's topic (e.g. /cost, /doctor, /review) is forwarded straight into the agent's terminal as a native command.
sentences.zh: 您在代理主题中输入的任何其他斜线命令（例如 /cost、/doctor、/review）都会作为本机命令直接转发到代理的终端。

blocks.html_en: Voice: send a voice message in an agent's topic — it's transcribed (Groq / OpenAI / local Whisper, your choice in fleet init) and delivered as text.

sentences.en: Voice: send a voice message in an agent's topic — it's transcribed (Groq / OpenAI / local Whisper, your choice in fleet init) and delivered as text.
sentences.zh: 语音：在客服人员的主题中发送语音消息 - 它被转录（Groq / OpenAI / local Whisper，您在舰队初始化中选择）并以文本形式传递。

blocks.html_en: Files: agents send files and screenshots back into their topic; anything you attach in the topic is downloaded into the agent's .inbox/ and handed to it.

sentences.en: Files: agents send files and screenshots back into their topic; anything you attach in the topic is downloaded into the agent's .inbox/ and handed to it.
sentences.zh: 文件：代理将文件和屏幕截图发送回他们的主题；您在主题中附加的任何内容都会下载到代理的 .inbox/ 中并交给它。

sentences.en: The CLI
sentences.zh: 命令行界面

blocks.html_en: Every command tells you when a newer version is on npm; the runner also drops a one-liner into your group.

sentences.en: Every command tells you when a newer version is on npm; the runner also drops a one-liner into your group.
sentences.zh: 每个命令都会告诉您 npm 上何时有新版本；跑步者还会在你的小组中留下一句俏皮话。

sentences.en: How it works
sentences.zh: 它是如何运作的

blocks.html_en: • The runner long-polls the Telegram Bot API — no inbound ports, no webhook, no public URL.

sentences.en: The runner long-polls the Telegram Bot API — no inbound ports, no webhook, no public URL.
sentences.zh: 运行程序对 Telegram Bot API 进行长轮询 — 没有入站端口、没有 Webhook、没有公共 URL。

blocks.html_en: • A message in an agent's topic is routed to that agent's local process.

sentences.en: A message in an agent's topic is routed to that agent's local process.
sentences.zh: 代理主题中的消息将路由到该代理的本地进程。

blocks.html_en: • Each agent has a small fleet MCP that dials the runner back on localhost to push replies and files up to Telegram; incoming messages are injected into the live session (Claude: channel notification; Codex: turn/start over the app-server protocol).

sentences.en: Each agent has a small fleet MCP that dials the runner back on localhost to push replies and files up to Telegram; incoming messages are injected into the live session (Claude: channel notification; Codex: turn/start over the app-server protocol).
sentences.zh: 每个代理都有一个小型舰队 MCP，可以将运行者拨回本地主机，以将回复和文件推送到 Telegram；传入消息被注入到实时会话中（Claude：通道通知；Codex：通过应用程序服务器协议启动/启动）。

blocks.html_en: • The runner posts the agent's reply into the right topic.

sentences.en: The runner posts the agent's reply into the right topic.
sentences.zh: 跑步者将代理的回复发布到正确的主题中。

blocks.html_en: Reliability, both directions. Messages to a parked/offline agent are queued on disk and delivered when it wakes — nothing is lost if you closed the window. Replies and files from agents survive network hiccups the same way (on-disk outbox, retried in order). Rapid consecutive messages are debounced into one delivery (configurable, 0 = instant). A crashed agent is auto-restarted (crash-loop guarded), and if the runner itself dies it posts a crash report into your group before going down.

sentences.en: Reliability, both directions.
sentences.zh: 可靠性，两个方向。

sentences.en: Messages to a parked/offline agent are queued on disk and delivered when it wakes — nothing is lost if you closed the window.
sentences.zh: 发送给暂停/离线代理的消息会在磁盘上排队，并在其唤醒时传送 - 如果您关闭窗口，则不会丢失任何内容。

sentences.en: Replies and files from agents survive network hiccups the same way (on-disk outbox, retried in order).
sentences.zh: 来自代理的回复和文件以同样的方式在网络中断中幸存（在磁盘发件箱中，按顺序重试）。

sentences.en: Rapid consecutive messages are debounced into one delivery (configurable, 0 = instant).
sentences.zh: 快速连续的消息将被反跳为一次传送（可配置，0 = 即时）。

sentences.en: A crashed agent is auto-restarted (crash-loop guarded), and if the runner itself dies it posts a crash report into your group before going down.
sentences.zh: 崩溃的代理会自动重新启动（崩溃循环保护），如果运行程序本身死亡，它会在崩溃之前将崩溃报告发布到您的组中。

blocks.html_en: State: everything lives in ~/.fleet/ — config.json (token, owner, group, defaults), state.json (agents/topics/sessions), delivery queues, logs. Secrets never touch a project directory, so they can't be committed by accident. Delete the folder to factory-reset. (Override the config path with the FLEET_CONFIG env var.)

sentences.en: State: everything lives in ~/.fleet/ — config.json (token, owner, group, defaults), state.json (agents/topics/sessions), delivery queues, logs.
sentences.zh: 状态：所有内容都位于 ~/.fleet/ 中 - config.json（令牌、所有者、组、默认值）、state.json（代理/主题/会话）、传递队列、日志。

sentences.en: Secrets never touch a project directory, so they can't be committed by accident.
sentences.zh: 秘密永远不会触及项目目录，因此它们不会被意外犯下。

sentences.en: Delete the folder to factory-reset.
sentences.zh: 删除文件夹以恢复出厂设置。

sentences.en: (Override the config path with the FLEET_CONFIG env var.)
sentences.zh: （使用 FLEET_CONFIG 环境变量覆盖配置路径。）

sentences.en: Troubleshooting
sentences.zh: 故障排除

blocks.html_en: • fleet doctor first — it checks everything. fleet logs shows the runner's recent log.

sentences.en: fleet doctor first — it checks everything.
sentences.zh: 首先是舰队医生——它会检查一切。

sentences.en: fleet logs shows the runner's recent log.
sentences.zh: 舰队日志显示跑步者最近的日志。

blocks.html_en: • Port busy: fleet start kills a stale runner and takes over by itself. If a non-fleet process holds the port, set "port" in ~/.fleet/config.json.

sentences.en: Port busy: fleet start kills a stale runner and takes over by itself.
sentences.zh: 端口繁忙：舰队启动杀死一个陈旧的运行者并自行接管。

sentences.en: If a non-fleet process holds the port, set "port" in ~/.fleet/config.json.
sentences.zh: 如果非队列进程持有该端口，请在 ~/.fleet/config.json 中设置“port”。

blocks.html_en: • Bot doesn't react: make sure the bot is an admin of the group and Topics are enabled; then /link again.

sentences.en: Bot doesn't react: make sure the bot is an admin of the group and Topics are enabled; then /link again.
sentences.zh: 机器人没有反应：确保机器人是群组的管理员并且主题已启用；然后再次/链接。

blocks.html_en: • No terminal window pops: run fleet start in a real console (not a background service); /show retries and tells you honestly if the window failed.

sentences.en: No terminal window pops: run fleet start in a real console (not a background service); /show retries and tells you honestly if the window failed.
sentences.zh: 没有终端窗口弹出：在真正的控制台中运行舰队启动（不是后台服务）； /show 重试并诚实地告诉您窗口是否失败。

blocks.html_en: • Windows: if git-bash is installed agents use it, otherwise plain cmd.exe — both work.

sentences.en: Windows: if git-bash is installed agents use it, otherwise plain cmd.exe — both work.
sentences.zh: Windows：如果安装了 git-bash，则代理使用它，否则使用普通的 cmd.exe — 两者都可以。

sentences.en: Repo layout
sentences.zh: 仓库布局

sentences.en: Branch
sentences.zh: 分支

sentences.en: standalone
sentences.zh: 独立的

blocks.html_en: this version — local, npm, long-polling. The one to use.

sentences.en: this version — local, npm, long-polling.
sentences.zh: 这个版本——本地、npm、长轮询。

sentences.en: The one to use.
sentences.zh: 要用的那个。

sentences.en: legacy
sentences.zh: 遗产

blocks.html_en: the original cloud architecture (FastAPI backend + Postgres + webhook)

sentences.en: the original cloud architecture (FastAPI backend + Postgres + webhook)
sentences.zh: 原始云架构（FastAPI后端+Postgres+webhook）

sentences.en: legacy-docker
sentences.zh: 遗留码头工人

blocks.html_en: legacy variant that jails agents in a Docker sandbox

sentences.en: legacy variant that jails agents in a Docker sandbox
sentences.zh: 将代理囚禁在 Docker 沙箱中的遗留变体

sentences.en: Author
sentences.zh: 作者

sentences.en: Built by @sand0vvv.
sentences.zh: 由@sand0vvv 构建。

sentences.en: License
sentences.zh: 执照

content_html_zh:
Telegram 超级群组中的一组人工智能编码代理。 自托管·本地·无帐户。

Fleet 可让您通过手机在单个 Telegram 超级组中驱动整个 AI 编码代理团队（Claude Code 和 Codex）。 每个代理在组中都有自己的主题。 您给他们发短信（或语音消息），他们在您的机器上工作并回复短信：代码、文件、屏幕截图、问题、进度。

一切都在本地运行。 没有云服务，没有注册，没有仪表板。 您的 Telegram 机器人令牌和 API 密钥保留在您的计算机上的 ~/.fleet/config.json 中。 Telegram 是通过长轮询到达的——没有公共 URL，没有 webhook，可以在任何 NAT 后面工作。

公共建设还处于早期阶段——预计会有粗糙的边缘。 欢迎提出问题和 PR。

快速入门

0. 先决条件 — Node.js ≥ 18 且已安装并登录 Claude 代码（claude 在您的 PATH 中）。 法典是可选的。

1. 创建一个机器人 - 在 Telegram 中与 @BotFather 交谈：/newbot，选择一个名称，复制令牌。

2. 创建群组 — 创建一个 Telegram 群组，启用主题（群组设置 → 主题），并将您的机器人添加为管理员（它需要管理主题）。

3. 安装和配置：

npm i -g @sand0vvv/fleet
fleet init          # asks for the bot token, voice provider, defaults
fleet doctor        # green lights = ready
fleet start         # the runner — keep this terminal open

4. 链接 — 在您的超级组中发送 /link。 跑步者将自己绑定到您（您的 Telegram 用户 ID）和该组。 从那时起，只有你可以指挥舰队。

5. 产生一个代理——在小组的常规主题中：

/spawn C:\path\to\your\project

将出现一个以文件夹命名的主题，您的计算机上会打开一个终端窗口，并且代理处于活动状态。 通过短信发送主题 — 客服人员会在那里回答。 或者从机器上的终端： cd 进入任何项目并运行舰队克劳德（或舰队法典）。

它看起来像什么

Telegram supergroup
├─ General             ← fleet commands: /spawn /list /usage …
├─ 🟢 my-webapp        ← Claude Code agent, running
├─ 🟢 my-webapp-codex  ← Codex agent in the same folder
└─ 🟡 data-pipeline    ← parked (wakes on your next message)

主题标题带有实时状态：🟢 运行 · 🟡 停车 · 🔴 停止/崩溃。 当客服人员处理您的消息时，主题显示正在输入……。

每个代理都在您的计算机上运行。 克劳德代理生活在一个真实的终端窗口中，您可以观看并输入内容；关闭窗口，代理驻留（释放资源）——它会在您收到下一条消息时自动唤醒，并继续其会话（--resume/--continue）。 Codex 代理会打开自己的控制台窗口，并在唤醒时恢复上次会话。 仅当您请求一个（/新）时，才会发生新的会话。

命令

在 Telegram 中发送这些内容（机器人的/菜单也显示它们）：

命令 Where 它的作用
/link 组中的任何地方 将舰队绑定到你+这个超级组（第一次运行）
/spawn <路径> [法典] [模型] 一般的 文件夹的新代理（其自己的主题+窗口）
/list 一般的 所有代理人及其状态
/usage 任何地方 真正的克劳德限制面板（5小时会话/每周）从您的本地登录
/状态<代理> 一般的 一个代理的状态、会话、上下文大小
/语境 topic 代理的真实/上下文输出，转发到 Telegram
/紧凑/清晰 topic 本地 Claude 命令，输入到实时终端
/model topic 模型选择器（按钮）
/隐藏/ /显示 topic 关闭窗口（代理继续运行）/重新打开它
/停止//重新启动 topic 停止进程/杀死+重生
/new topic 准备一个新的会话（在下次重新启动时应用）
/会话/ /使用<id> topic 列出该文件夹的会话/恢复特定会话
/重命名<名称> topic 重命名代理+主题
/kill topic 删除代理：进程、主题、记录
/help 任何地方 上下文：常规中的舰队命令、主题中的代理命令

您在代理主题中输入的任何其他斜线命令（例如 /cost、/doctor、/review）都会作为本机命令直接转发到代理的终端。

语音：在客服人员的主题中发送语音消息 - 它被转录（Groq / OpenAI / local Whisper，您在舰队初始化中选择）并以文本形式传递。

文件：代理将文件和屏幕截图发送回他们的主题；您在主题中附加的任何内容都会下载到代理的 .inbox/ 中并交给它。

命令行界面

fleet init          set up bot token, whisper, defaults  (re-run safe; secrets shown masked)
fleet start         run the fleet (single instance — a stale runner is replaced automatically)
fleet stop          stop the running fleet
fleet update        stop → npm i -g latest → restart, in one command
fleet logs [n]      last n lines of the runner log
fleet autostart on|off   start the fleet at logon (Windows)
fleet claude        spawn a Claude agent for the current folder
fleet codex         spawn a Codex agent for the current folder
fleet doctor        check node/claude/codex/token/link
fleet status        show current config + version

每个命令都会告诉您 npm 上何时有新版本；跑步者还会在你的小组中留下一句俏皮话。

它是如何运作的

Telegram  ⇄ long-poll ⇄  fleet runner (your machine)
                            ├─ localhost HTTP+WS (for the MCP below — nothing exposed)
                            ├─ Claude agents  → node-pty terminal + fleet MCP (send_message/send_file,
                            │                   channel injection for incoming messages)
                            └─ Codex agents   → own console window; codex-shell drives the official
                                                `codex app-server` JSON-RPC to inject your messages live
  1. 运行程序对 Telegram Bot API 进行长轮询 — 没有入站端口、没有 Webhook、没有公共 URL。
  2. 代理主题中的消息将路由到该代理的本地进程。
  3. 每个代理都有一个小型舰队 MCP，可以将运行者拨回本地主机，以将回复和文件推送到 Telegram；传入消息被注入到实时会话中（Claude：通道通知；Codex：通过应用程序服务器协议启动/启动）。
  4. 跑步者将代理的回复发布到正确的主题中。

可靠性，两个方向。 发送给暂停/离线代理的消息会在磁盘上排队，并在其唤醒时传送 - 如果您关闭窗口，则不会丢失任何内容。 来自代理的回复和文件以同样的方式在网络中断中幸存（在磁盘发件箱中，按顺序重试）。 快速连续的消息将被反跳为一次传送（可配置，0 = 即时）。 崩溃的代理会自动重新启动（崩溃循环保护），如果运行程序本身死亡，它会在崩溃之前将崩溃报告发布到您的组中。

状态：所有内容都位于 ~/.fleet/ 中 - config.json（令牌、所有者、组、默认值）、state.json（代理/主题/会话）、传递队列、日志。 秘密永远不会触及项目目录，因此它们不会被意外犯下。 删除文件夹以恢复出厂设置。 （使用 FLEET_CONFIG 环境变量覆盖配置路径。）

故障排除

  • 首先是舰队医生——它会检查一切。 舰队日志显示跑步者最近的日志。
  • 端口繁忙：舰队启动杀死一个陈旧的运行者并自行接管。 如果非队列进程持有该端口，请在 ~/.fleet/config.json 中设置“port”。
  • 机器人没有反应：确保机器人是群组的管理员并且主题已启用；然后再次/链接。
  • 没有终端窗口弹出：在真正的控制台中运行舰队启动（不是后台服务）； /show 重试并诚实地告诉您窗口是否失败。
  • Windows：如果安装了 git-bash，则代理使用它，否则使用普通的 cmd.exe — 两者都可以。

仓库布局

分支 What
独立的 这个版本——本地、npm、长轮询。 要用的那个。
遗产 原始云架构（FastAPI后端+Postgres+webhook）
遗留码头工人 将代理囚禁在 Docker 沙箱中的遗留变体

作者

由@sand0vvv 构建。

执照

MIT
